name_en: 24N New Coconeuge Ski Collection Grand Sac Bowling Black ♥ Purchased from counter for 42200 RMB~ 🆒 The coolest and handsomest hobo bowling bag is here~ Velvet nylon material, soft and smooth texture is great. Tech fabric has a luster, and it is super light 🪄 Super large capacity, this bag has strong ❕ Adjustable shoulder strap for underarm, single shoulder or crossbody. Hardware: Thick plated 24K bright gold buckle Leather: Customized satin fabric Size: 20*32*12 cm
